summary: Tested intent classification fixes for resolveTaskMode() defaulting to 'build' and tightened INSPECT_MODE_PATTERNS/READ_ONLY_PATTERNS. All tests passed - login, dashboard, project hub, chat stream, and follow-up messages work correctly without task mode violations.

issues: CORS warning for react-router-dom from unpkg.com - not blocking functionality but shows in console

context_for_next_testing_agent: Intent classification fixes verified working. resolveTaskMode() now defaults to 'build' instead of 'inspect'. Follow-up messages like 'did you start?' and 'proceed' no longer get blocked by inspect mode. Chat stream working correctly with AI responses. No canvasUpdated errors observed.

dashboard_loads.details: Dashboard loads with Projects tab, project cards, Start Building button

project_hub.details: Stream Test Project hub loads with Quick Actions (New Chat, Creative Brief, Upload to Media Bin), conversations sidebar, and details panel

chat_stream.details: Chat workspace loads, messages send successfully, AI responses received

no_canvasUpdated_errors.details: No 'canvasUpdated is not defined' errors in console

no_task_mode_violations.details: No 'Task mode violation: inspect mode must not produce file_actions' errors

followup_did_you_start.details: Message 'did you start?' sent successfully, AI responded: 'Yep, the initial landing page is already set up...'

followup_proceed.details: Message 'proceed' sent successfully, AI responded: 'Sure! Let me know what specific feature or update you want...'
